transcript.clean_text: brittany was again the venue for stage three of the tour de france with the teams mechanics and riders all turning up ready to go in the city of l'oreal and from l'oreal they would travel to pont tv for the first time in the tours history 182.9 kilometers should provide the first opportunity for the sprinters just two classified climbs and an intermediate sprint before a tricky finish with a few twists and turns towards the end the breakaway didn't take long to go on day three yet again either schelling was up the road for borah hansgroh trying to take the polka dot jersey off of the back of mata von der pool skelling looking after it for him on this day accompanied by four riders in the break but behind there was drama early on there's tony martin robert jesink and garrett thomas fell thomas looking initially in trouble having a dislocated shoulder and having to have it put back in casing unfortunately a non-finisher bad news number is made out of seven men thomas was helped back to the peloton by his teammates and up ahead the breakaway fought the prizes out skelling would go out and take the sole point at the top of the first climb he'd then leave the breakaway knowing he'd keep the jersey for the next few days with no points on offer until stage six inside the final 10 kilometers the break brought back and unfortunately more bad drama started primogeoglitch going down he was forced to chase back on once back on his bike but looking in a mess the drama hadn't finished there i'm afraid on their way into town for case out a bad crash with jack hague on the ground several other riders caught up behind hague being treated and a front group of only around 25 riders left to contest the sprint in the yellow jersey mature founder paul trying to lead out his teammates jasper phillips and then took it out tim melia was sitting on the wheel and ready to go and segan were all up there with paul and ballerini a la felipe in the group but then this happened another crash this time with 150 meters to go this time taking out kaleb and peter sagan and tim medley winning a stage at the tour de france for the first time in his career just his third day at the tour and already a winner whilst the worry behind was for ewing and the rest pogacha losing time a whole host of gc riders also shipping seconds primoz roglic coming in with valverde and lopez caleb young looking like he was out of the tour de france following that crash peter sagan denied an opportunity to sprint tim mellier taking victory two stage wins out of two for the second division alpacine fenix team with mature von nepal keeping the yellow jersey medleyed phillipson with a one-two for alpacin fenix blaney finishing the best of the rest a yellow jersey again for matchup on a pool keeping it for a day longer than his father adri his lead eight seconds over allah philippe with kalapaz moving up to third fanat in fourth keldam and fifth roglic moving out of the top ten garrick thomas also losing time too 52 seconds separating first and tenth final breath on stage will take place on day four starting in rhoden i'm heading up to fujair a shorter stage this one 150 kilometers on the menu and returning to fuja scene of a mark cavendish victory the last time the race was in town no categorized climbs on the menu yet more drama will be on the menu cycling fans around the world can only hope and pray that all the riders who crashed are okay and then we have more positive drama on day four
